title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Construction Card Services LLP
body: "Application number 5408  Applicant Construction Skills Certification Scheme Limited objected to the name used by Construction Card Services LLP under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 17 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Construction Card Services LLP is changed to OC455986, Ltd. "
